name: @ogulcancelik/pi-flicker
description: A pi extension that brings Claude Code flicker to pi
readme:
# pi-flicker

Do you miss Claude Code flickers?

Worry no more. Install `pi-flicker` so you feel at home.

## Install

```bash
pi install npm:@ogulcancelik/pi-flicker
```

Or load it directly:

```bash
pi -e /absolute/path/to/packages/pi-flicker/index.ts
```

## But why?
Why not?
